perspectives.name: feature_gap
perspectives.label: Feature Gap
perspectives.desc: Compare specs vs. implementation, identify unimplemented features, generate new feature tasks

perspectives.name: bug_hunt
perspectives.label: Bug Hunt
perspectives.desc: Review existing code logic, find potential bugs, boundary errors, unhandled exceptions, generate fix tasks

perspectives.name: test_coverage
perspectives.label: Test Coverage
perspectives.desc: Find implemented features lacking tests, generate test writing tasks

perspectives.name: performance
perspectives.label: Performance Audit
perspectives.desc: Identify performance bottlenecks, memory leaks, unnecessary computation, generate optimization tasks

perspectives.name: code_quality
perspectives.label: Code Quality
perspectives.desc: Find code smells, duplicated logic, excessive coupling, generate refactoring tasks

perspectives.name: content
perspectives.label: Content Integrity
perspectives.desc: Check content implementation completeness, generate content creation tasks

perspectives.name: ux
perspectives.label: User Experience
perspectives.desc: Evaluate user experience flow, missing visual feedback, unintuitive operations, generate UX improvement tasks

perspectives.name: integration
perspectives.label: System Integration
perspectives.desc: Check subsystem interactions and data flow correctness, generate integration fix tasks

perspectives.name: resource_pipeline
perspectives.label: Resource Pipeline
perspectives.desc: Check resource extraction, parsing, and import pipeline completeness, generate pipeline tasks
